name: Walking With Bag
prompt_fragment: The model walks slowly while carrying the handbag naturally at the side.
camera_motion: slow forward dolly with subtle handheld steadiness
product_interaction: bag remains visible, stable, and close to the model hand
composition_space_hint: clear empty space near the model's right hand and right hip for later handbag placement
occlusion_hint: hand visible, relaxed fingers, no object currently held
hero_action_prompt_fragment: adult editorial model walking naturally through the scene with empty hands visible, right hand relaxed near the right hip, no object held, clear space near the right side for later product placement
hero_pose_intent: empty visible right hand and clean right-side silhouette for later product placement
